data.title: CF Industries, JERA, Mitsui Form $4 Billion JV To Build Low-Carbon Ammonia Plant In Louisiana
data.description: CF Industries forms JV with JERA and Mitsui for CO₂ capturing and low-carbon ammonia production. CF to hold 40%, JERA 35%, Mitsui 25% ownership.

data.title: AMD Powers Google Cloud's New AI Servers Promising 80% Boost In Speed
data.description: AMD announced new C4D and H4D VMs powered by 5th-gen EPYC processors for high-performance computing. Stock down due to China tariffs and competition with Nvidia.

data.title: Disney Cuts Prices And Adds Perks To Lure Families Back To Orlando Parks
data.description: Disney plans discounts and events to boost footfall at Orlando theme park amid stiff competition; announces new leadership, complimentary meals, and more.

data.title: Annexon's Investigational Drug Shows Rapid Recovery And Durable Benefit In Rare Neurological Disorder
data.description: Annexon's tanruprubart showed significant and sustained functional gains in Guillain-Barré patients, meeting key Phase 3 trial endpoints.

data.title: What's Driving the Market Sentiment Around Mattel?
